candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; included only because it appeared in the candidate list.
Exact balance-sheet cash line matching cash and cash equivalents.
Cash flow ending cash agrees numerically, but balance-sheet cash is the preferred source for CHE.
Exact match for total current liabilities.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Best direct match for short-term debt/current portion of long-term debt, explicitly excluding leases as required.
Would conceptually fit STD, but values are blank and the cleaner reported current-portion line exists.
Interest payable is not debt principal and should be excluded from STD.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: Selected a label outside the shortlist because it is the cleanest reported short-term debt measure and explicitly excludes capitalized leases.

candidates.why: Direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this balance-sheet label is a clear direct match.

candidates.why: Only explicit balance-sheet PPE line; net PPE is preferred when total PPE is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net
candidates.why: Right-of-use lease asset, not baseline PPEGT.

variables.notes: R:nc. Chosen because it is the only explicit PPE balance-sheet line. Manual review recommended since no broader total PPE line appears and the company is investment-property-heavy.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow/net cash from operating activities.

candidates.row_label: CF from Operating Activities before Working Capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final operating cash flow figure.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash Flow from Operating Activities
